title: Algerian Bean Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew originating from Algeria, made with tender beans and spices.

ingredients.name: Algerian
ingredients.notes: Use ras el hanout spice blend

instructions: Heat the xtra in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the Algerian and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the beans, 2 cups of water, and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
Stir in the tagine and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Spoon the mixture over fluffy couscous and serve.
